title: Nyquist Sampling Explained
script_summary: Exploring the fundamentals of Nyquist sampling reveals crucial insights about signal processing.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about Nyquist sampling than social media does.
Nyquist sampling helps us understand how to capture sound and images accurately.
If you don't sample often enough, your data gets distorted—ever heard of aliasing?
The Nyquist theorem states you need to sample at least twice the highest frequency.
So, proper sampling prevents loss of information and keeps our audio and visuals sharp.
Want to dive deeper into tech secrets? Like and follow for more!
